title: Make the dashboard feel snappier
description: Users keep saying the reporting dashboard is sluggish. We should tune it up so it feels responsive and modern. Nice to have this before the next demo.
acceptance_criteria: AC1: The dashboard should be fast.
AC2: It should look better than it does now.

comments.author: rita.okoro@example.com
comments.body: No numbers attached yet — can we get a target load time from the product side before QA touches this?
